title: sesbania hirtistyla var. hirtistyla
intro: Sesbania hirtistyla var. hirtistyla, also known as the 'Tambaliza' or 'White Climber', is a plant species belonging to the family Fabaceae, characterized by its climbing habit and white flowers. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Sesbania hirtistyla var. hirtistyla include relief from fever, pain, and inflammation, as well as potential uses in treating various gastrointestinal issues and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made by infusing its leaves and stems in hot water or using them in decoctions to create teas or tonics for medicinal purposes.
